title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex 2.5G
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex 2.5G is a compact switch designed to expand networks in home and office environments. It features 8x 2.5Gbit ports , enabling easy integration of devices with higher transfer speeds, such as modern access points, servers, or NAS storage systems. The switch supports management via the UniFi Network application, simplifying configuration and network monitoring The uplink is a combo 10G RJ45 / SFP+ port. One of its key features is Power over Ethernet support, meaning the device can be powered directly through a network cable via the uplink port's PoE input (802.3at / POE+), or alternatively via the included USB-C adapter. Although the uplink port is a combo, you can use not only one of the ports but also the metallic port for power and the optical port for data simultaneously With its minimalist design, it is ideal for placement on a desk or wall mounting. With an optional kit, DIN rail mounting is also possible. It is fully compatible with UniFi products and allows easy scalability as needed. Managing the device requires the UniFi Network application v9.0.108 or newer Device USB-C Power Adapter (5V / 3A) Drilling Template Wall Mount Bracket Mounting Kit
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (8) 100/1000/2500 Mbps + (1) 10G RJ45/SFP+ Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps Combo Power Power type PoE, USB-C PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 14 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 3A Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 45 Width [mm] 213 Height [mm] 34 Depth [mm] 76 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 60 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 44
